chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.41 of 2025 Muhammad Ali Zaidi Versus Kamran Khan Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 697/25 2. For orders on office objection/reply “A” 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 30.09.2025 Mr. Jawaid Panhwar, advocate for appellant. Raja M. Arsalan, advocate for respondent. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that during pendency of this appeal the execution has been allowed and now he intends to challenge the orders passed in the execution proceedings, therefore, does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed, along with listed application, in the above terms. Judge Judge
